title: doctor.sh staleness check fix
description: Fix the staleness check in doctor.sh to use metadata `last_active_at` instead of commit time. Currently uses `git log -1 --format="%ct"` which marks a worktree stale if the commit is 10+ days old, but the metadata `last_active_at` field is more accurate for activity tracking.
implementation: Modify staleness check to read from `.worktree-first/worktrees/<slug>.json` and use the `last_active_at` timestamp field instead of `git log -1 --format="%ct"`. Must handle missing metadata files gracefully (fallback to current behavior).
convergence: doctor.sh uses last_active_at from metadata for staleness check
Missing metadata files fall back gracefully without error
Active tasks (recent last_active_at) are not marked stale
